Now Hiring – Machilipatnam

Medical Representative Jobs in Machilipatnam, Krishna District

Crasenim Pharma is hiring Medical Representatives in Machilipatnam, a historic coastal city in Krishna district with a loyal and long-established medical community. Stable prescription volumes across antibiotic, cardiac, and gastric categories make this a rewarding territory for experienced MRs who value relationship-based pharma selling. Full-time and commission-based roles are open now.

📍 Machilipatnam, Krishna District 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 Experienced MRs Preferred
💬 Apply via WhatsApp All Openings
Territory

Machilipatnam Pharma Market Overview

Machilipatnam is one of Krishna district's oldest and most recognised cities — a historic coastal town with a medical community that stretches back generations. Its GPs, nursing homes, and standalone clinics are well-established institutions with large, loyal patient bases, translating into stable and predictable prescription volumes across antibiotic, cardiac, and gastric categories.

Unlike rapidly developing cities, Machilipatnam rewards patient, relationship-driven MR behaviour. Doctors here are familiar with how pharma promotion works and are responsive to MRs who demonstrate consistency, product knowledge, and genuine service over time. This makes it an excellent territory for experienced MRs looking to build deep, long-term prescription relationships. Sub-territory coverage includes Avanigadda and Nagayalanka.

Key Markets – Machilipatnam Territory

Machilipatnam (HQ), Avanigadda, Nagayalanka, Bantumilli, Kankipadu

  • Historic coastal city with a loyal, long-established GP and nursing home network
  • Stable, consistent prescription volumes across antibiotic, cardiac, and gastric categories
  • Relationship-driven medical community — rewards consistent, professional MR visits
  • Good territory for experienced MRs who value depth of engagement over rapid turnover
  • Commission-based roles available with no investment required
  • Detailing material, product training, and field support from Crasenim Pharma HQ
Job Openings

Pharma Vacancies in Machilipatnam

Medical Representative – Machilipatnam, Krishna District
📍 Machilipatnam, Krishna District💼 Full-Time🕒 2–5 Years Preferred
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma products to GPs, specialists, nursing homes, and pharmacies in Machilipatnam
  • Cover Machilipatnam city and assigned sub-territory (Avanigadda, Nagayalanka, or Bantumilli)
  • Competitive salary + travel allowance + monthly performance incentives
  • Regular product knowledge sessions and professional detailing support from Crasenim HQ
Commission-Based MR – Machilipatnam / Avanigadda
📍 Machilipatnam / Avanigadda💼 Commission🕒 Experience Preferred
Now Hiring
  • Earn monthly commission on prescriptions generated for Crasenim Pharma in the Machilipatnam territory
  • Cover Machilipatnam, Avanigadda, Nagayalanka, or Bantumilli based on your existing doctor relationships
  • No investment required — immediate start for candidates with an established local doctor network
  • Performance bonuses for repeat prescription consistency and nursing home penetration
FAQs

Pharma MR Jobs in Machilipatnam – FAQ

Are MR jobs currently open in Machilipatnam at Crasenim Pharma?
Yes. We have active openings for full-time Medical Representatives and commission-based MRs in Machilipatnam. We particularly value candidates with prior pharma field experience in the Machilipatnam or Krishna district coastal belt, as this territory rewards established doctor relationships.
What territory would I cover as an MR in Machilipatnam?
Your primary territory is Machilipatnam city and its nursing home and GP network. Depending on your assignment, you may also cover Avanigadda, Nagayalanka, or Bantumilli. Territory allocation is discussed during the hiring process based on your experience and local knowledge.
How do I apply for a pharma MR job in Machilipatnam?
Send a WhatsApp message with your details to +91 99890 74806, email us at crasenimpharma@gmail.com, or submit the application form on our Careers page. Mention Machilipatnam as your preferred location.
